# dispatchAlert

> Send alert to all matching channels and record delivery

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| alert | AlertEvent | yes |
| db | Database | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[channels: call listAlertChannels]
  A --> B[matched: call filterChannelsBySeverity]
  B --> C[results: call sendToProvider]
  C --> D[recordDelivery: call createAlertEvent]
  D --> E[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `DispatchResult[]`
